sizing_rule.note: Risk 0.5% per trade; reduce to 0.25% after 3 consecutive losses. Formula: position_size = (account_equity × max_loss_pct) / stop_loss_distance

source_rule_text: A trader must use position-sizing models to limit the absolute dollar loss per trade, preventing catastrophic loss spirals where recovery requires risking disproportionately large amounts relative to potential profit.
